## All PR Comments Addressed
Total comments: 5 review threads + 3 discussion comments Batches: 1 Commits: 1 (a5e7e6cb8)
All review threads resolved. All discussion comments replied to.
Next steps: 1. Push changes: - **Graphite repos**: `gt submit` (or `gt ss`) - **Plain git repos**: `git push` - If push is rejected (non-fast-forward): Run `/erk:sync-divergence` to resolve. Do NOT use `git pull --rebase`. 2. Wait for CI to pass 3. Request re-review if needed
session.user:
# Quick Submit
Quickly commit all changes with a generic "update" message and submit to Graphite.
## Usage
```bash /quick-submit ```
## Implementation
Run the CLI command:
```bash erk exec quick-submit ```
## Notes
- This is a shortcut for rapid iteration - Uses generic "update" commit message - For proper commit messages, use `/erk:pr-submit` instead

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: erk exec quick-submit
Quick submit all changes via Graphite

session.tool_result: Staging all changes... Checking for staged changes... Submitting to Graphite... Getting PR URL... { "success": true, "staged_changes": false, "committed": false, "message": "No new changes, submitted existing commits", "pr_url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8125" }
session.assistant: Submitted — no new changes to commit, existing commits pushed. PR: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8125
